title: Hi, I’m Madeline. Welcome to my website!
text:
# About Me I am a third-year PhD Student in the Lotterhos Lab at Northeastern University’s Marine Science Center.


Check out the Lotterhos Lab Website for more information about my lab and our research!



I made this website with Quarto. Learn more about Quarto websites here: https://quarto.org/docs/websites.
